simpleDefinition: A room where food is kept, prepared, and cooked.
exampleSentence: We cook dinner in the kitchen.
exampleThai: พวกเราทำอาหารเย็นในห้องครัว
imagePrompt: A clean, bright modern kitchen with a stove and cabinets.

simpleDefinition: A flat dish used for eating or serving food.
exampleSentence: Please put the food on the plate.
exampleThai: กรุณาวางอาหารบนจาน
imagePrompt: A clean white round ceramic plate on a wooden table.

simpleDefinition: A round, deep dish used for holding soup or other food.
exampleSentence: I eat soup from a bowl.
exampleThai: ฉันกินซุปจากชาม
imagePrompt: A ceramic bowl filled with hot soup, placed on a table.

thaiMeaning: ถ้วย (มีหูจับ)
simpleDefinition: A small, round container with a handle, used for drinking tea or coffee.
exampleSentence: I would like a cup of coffee.
exampleThai: ฉันขอเครื่องดื่มกาแฟหนึ่งถ้วย
imagePrompt: A white ceramic cup filled with hot coffee, sitting on a saucer.

simpleDefinition: A hard, transparent container used for drinking cold drinks.
exampleSentence: She drinks a glass of water.
exampleThai: เธอดื่มน้ำหนึ่งแก้ว
imagePrompt: A tall, clear glass filled with cold water and ice cubes.

simpleDefinition: A tool with a handle and a small, shallow bowl used for eating or serving.
exampleSentence: He eats his soup with a spoon.
exampleThai: เขากินซุปด้วยช้อน
imagePrompt: A shiny silver spoon resting on a white napkin.

simpleDefinition: A tool with a handle and points used for picking up food.
exampleSentence: I use a fork to eat salad.
exampleThai: ฉันใช้ส้อมกินสลัด
imagePrompt: A stainless steel fork on a wooden dining table.

simpleDefinition: A tool with a sharp edge used for cutting.
exampleSentence: Be careful with that sharp knife.
exampleThai: ระวังมีดเล่มนั้นนะ มันคม
imagePrompt: A kitchen knife with a black handle lying on a wooden cutting board.

simpleDefinition: A flat-bottomed container used for frying or cooking food.
exampleSentence: I cook eggs in a frying pan.
exampleThai: ฉันทอดไข่ในกระทะ
imagePrompt: A black frying pan on a kitchen stove.

simpleDefinition: A deep, round container used for cooking food.
exampleSentence: The soup is cooking in a large pot.
exampleThai: ซุปกำลังต้มอยู่ในหม้อใบใหญ่
imagePrompt: A stainless steel cooking pot with a lid on a stove.

simpleDefinition: A machine that keeps food and drinks cold.
exampleSentence: Put the milk in the fridge.
exampleThai: เอานมไปเก็บในตู้เย็น
imagePrompt: A tall, silver refrigerator in a modern kitchen.

simpleDefinition: A machine for baking or roasting food.
exampleSentence: She bakes a cake in the oven.
exampleThai: เธออบเค้กในเตาอบ
imagePrompt: A modern electric oven built into a kitchen cabinet.

thaiMeaning: เตาแก๊ส, เตาไฟฟ้า
simpleDefinition: A machine used to cook food by applying heat.
exampleSentence: Don't touch the hot stove.
exampleThai: อย่าแตะเตาที่กำลังร้อนนะ
imagePrompt: A gas stove with blue flames under a pot.

thaiMeaning: อ่างล้างจาน, อ่างล้างหน้า
simpleDefinition: A bowl fixed to the wall or counter where you wash things.
exampleSentence: Wash your hands in the sink.
exampleThai: ล้างมือของคุณในอ่างล้างมือ
imagePrompt: A stainless steel kitchen sink with running water from a faucet.

simpleDefinition: A piece of furniture with a flat top and legs, used for eating or working.
exampleSentence: We eat dinner at the table.
exampleThai: พวกเรากินอาหารเย็นที่โต๊ะ
imagePrompt: A wooden dining table set for four people.

simpleDefinition: A room with a toilet, sink, and often a shower or bath.
exampleSentence: I need to use the bathroom.
exampleThai: ฉันต้องการเข้าห้องน้ำ
imagePrompt: A clean, well-lit bathroom with white tiles and a mirror.

thaiMeaning: โถส้วม, ห้องน้ำ
simpleDefinition: A bowl connected to a pipe, used for human waste.
exampleSentence: Please flush the toilet.
exampleThai: กรุณากดชักโครก
imagePrompt: A clean white ceramic toilet in a modern bathroom.

thaiMeaning: ฝักบัว, การอาบน้ำฝักบัว
simpleDefinition: A device that sprays water for you to wash your body.
exampleSentence: I take a shower every morning.
exampleThai: ฉันอาบน้ำฝักบัวทุกเช้า
imagePrompt: A modern glass shower enclosure with water flowing from a shower head.

thaiMeaning: อ่างอาบน้ำ
simpleDefinition: A large container you fill with water to wash your whole body.
exampleSentence: The baby is playing in the bathtub.
exampleThai: เด็กทารกกำลังเล่นอยู่ในอ่างอาบน้ำ
imagePrompt: A white bathtub filled with warm water and bubbles.

simpleDefinition: A substance used with water for washing and cleaning.
exampleSentence: Wash your hands with soap and water.
exampleThai: ล้างมือของคุณด้วยสบู่และน้ำ
imagePrompt: A bar of white soap with bubbles on a wooden dish.

simpleDefinition: A liquid soap used for washing hair.
exampleSentence: I need to buy some shampoo for my hair.
exampleThai: ฉันต้องซื้อยาสระผมสำหรับผมของฉัน
imagePrompt: A plastic bottle of shampoo with a pump next to a shower.

thaiMeaning: ผ้าเช็ดตัว
simpleDefinition: A piece of soft cloth used for drying things or yourself.
exampleSentence: Dry your hands on the towel.
exampleThai: เช็ดมือของคุณด้วยผ้าเช็ดตัว
imagePrompt: A folded, fluffy white towel on a bathroom counter.

simpleDefinition: A small brush used for cleaning teeth.
exampleSentence: I brush my teeth with a blue toothbrush.
exampleThai: ฉันแปรงฟันด้วยแปรงสีฟันสีฟ้า
imagePrompt: A blue toothbrush with toothpaste on it, lying on a counter.

simpleDefinition: A thick substance used on a toothbrush to clean teeth.
exampleSentence: Put some toothpaste on your brush.
exampleThai: บีบยาสีฟันลงบนแปรงของคุณ
imagePrompt: A tube of toothpaste squeezed slightly next to a toothbrush.

simpleDefinition: A smooth glass surface that reflects images.
exampleSentence: She looks at herself in the mirror.
exampleThai: เธอมองดูตัวเองในกระจก
imagePrompt: A large round mirror on a bathroom wall, reflecting light.

thaiMeaning: กระดาษชำระ, ทิชชู่ห้องน้ำ
simpleDefinition: Soft paper used in the bathroom for cleaning yourself.
exampleSentence: We need to buy more toilet paper.
exampleThai: พวกเราต้องซื้อกระดาษชำระเพิ่ม
imagePrompt: A roll of soft white toilet paper sitting on a holder.

thaiMeaning: ล้าง, ซัก, สระ
simpleDefinition: To clean something using water and usually soap.
exampleSentence: Please wash your face.
exampleThai: กรุณาล้างหน้าของคุณ
imagePrompt: A pair of hands being washed under running water with soap.

simpleDefinition: Not dirty; free from dirt or marks.
exampleSentence: The bathroom is very clean.
exampleThai: ห้องน้ำสะอาดมาก
imagePrompt: A sparkling clean white bathroom floor and tiles.

simpleDefinition: Not clean; covered in dirt.
exampleSentence: Your hands are dirty, go wash them.
exampleThai: มือของคุณสกปรก ไปล้างมือซะ
imagePrompt: A pair of hands covered in mud and dirt.

simpleDefinition: To clean or tidy something using a brush.
exampleSentence: I brush my teeth twice a day.
exampleThai: ฉันแปรงฟันวันละสองครั้ง
imagePrompt: A person brushing their teeth in front of a mirror.

simpleDefinition: Things that people and animals eat.
exampleSentence: This food is very delicious.
exampleThai: อาหารจานนี้อร่อยมาก
imagePrompt: A large table full of different colorful, tasty dishes.

thaiMeaning: เครื่องดื่ม
simpleDefinition: A liquid that you take into your body through your mouth.
exampleSentence: Can I have a cold drink?
exampleThai: ฉันขอเครื่องดื่มเย็นๆ ได้ไหม?
imagePrompt: A glass of cold orange juice with ice on a table.

simpleDefinition: A common food made from flour and water, baked in an oven.
exampleSentence: I eat bread for breakfast.
exampleThai: ฉันกินขนมปังเป็นอาหารเช้า
imagePrompt: A loaf of freshly baked brown bread on a cutting board.

simpleDefinition: Small white or brown grains eaten as food, common in Asia.
exampleSentence: Thai people eat rice every day.
exampleThai: คนไทยกินข้าวทุกวัน
imagePrompt: A white ceramic bowl filled with cooked white rice.

thaiMeaning: เนื้อสัตว์
simpleDefinition: The flesh of an animal eaten as food.
exampleSentence: He likes to eat red meat.
exampleThai: เขาชอบกินเนื้อแดง
imagePrompt: A piece of raw red meat on a wooden butcher block.

simpleDefinition: An animal that lives in water, often eaten as food.
exampleSentence: We are having grilled fish for dinner.
exampleThai: พวกเราจะกินปลาสำหรับอาหารเย็น
imagePrompt: A nicely grilled fish on a plate with lemon slices.

thaiMeaning: ไก่ (เนื้อไก่)
simpleDefinition: A bird kept on a farm for its meat and eggs.
exampleSentence: I like fried chicken.
exampleThai: ฉันชอบไก่ทอด
imagePrompt: A plate of crispy fried chicken pieces.

simpleDefinition: An oval object produced by birds, eaten as food.
exampleSentence: I eat an egg for breakfast.
exampleThai: ฉันกินไข่หนึ่งฟองเป็นอาหารเช้า
imagePrompt: A white egg in an egg cup on a table.

simpleDefinition: A white liquid produced by cows, used as a drink.
exampleSentence: Cats love to drink milk.
exampleThai: แมวชอบดื่มนม
imagePrompt: A clear glass filled with cold white milk.

simpleDefinition: A popular dark drink with caffeine, usually served hot.
exampleSentence: He drinks coffee every morning.
exampleThai: เขาดื่มกาแฟทุกเช้า
imagePrompt: A hot cup of dark coffee with steam rising from it.

simpleDefinition: A hot drink made by putting dried leaves in boiling water.
exampleSentence: Would you like some green tea?
exampleThai: คุณอยากรับชาเขียวไหม?
imagePrompt: A warm cup of clear yellow tea with a tea bag tag hanging over the edge.

simpleDefinition: The liquid that comes from fresh fruit or vegetables.
exampleSentence: I want a glass of orange juice.
exampleThai: ฉันต้องการน้ำส้มหนึ่งแก้ว
imagePrompt: A tall glass of bright orange juice on a wooden table.

simpleDefinition: A round fruit with red, green, or yellow skin.
exampleSentence: She is eating a red apple.
exampleThai: เธอกำลังกินแอปเปิลสีแดง
imagePrompt: A shiny red apple with a green leaf attached to the stem.

simpleDefinition: A long curved fruit with a yellow skin.
exampleSentence: Monkeys love to eat bananas.
exampleThai: ลิงชอบกินกล้วย
imagePrompt: A ripe yellow banana, partially peeled.

simpleDefinition: A round citrus fruit with thick orange skin.
exampleSentence: This orange is very sweet.
exampleThai: ส้มผลนี้หวานมาก
imagePrompt: A bright orange fruit cut in half on a white plate.

simpleDefinition: A sweet substance used to make food and drinks sweeter.
exampleSentence: I don't put sugar in my tea.
exampleThai: ฉันไม่ใส่น้ำตาลในชาของฉัน
imagePrompt: A small bowl filled with white granulated sugar.

simpleDefinition: A white substance used to add flavor to food.
exampleSentence: The soup needs more salt.
exampleThai: ซุปต้องใส่เกลือเพิ่ม
imagePrompt: A salt shaker pouring white salt onto a black surface.

thaiMeaning: กิน, รับประทาน
simpleDefinition: To put food into your mouth, chew, and swallow it.
exampleSentence: What do you want to eat?
exampleThai: คุณต้องการกินอะไร?
imagePrompt: A person bringing a forkful of food to their mouth.

simpleDefinition: Feeling that you want or need to eat.
exampleSentence: I am very hungry now.
exampleThai: ตอนนี้ฉันหิวมาก
imagePrompt: A person looking at an empty plate with a sad face.

thaiMeaning: กระหายน้ำ, หิวน้ำ
simpleDefinition: Feeling that you want or need to drink something.
exampleSentence: It is hot, and I am thirsty.
exampleThai: อากาศร้อน และฉันก็กระหายน้ำ
imagePrompt: A person drinking water greedily from a plastic bottle.
